summary: The South Bay is riding a funding surge: over $4 billion flowed into local startups in the past six weeks, with AI companies like Nexthop and Rhoda capturing the biggest checks in Santa Clara and Palo Alto. Hardware plays are hot too—SiFive raised $400M and Frore Systems $143M—signaling renewed investor appetite for chip design. Most companies are still hiring, though the market's splitting between growth-stage winners and more cautious players.
